boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant or change the requested access, role, permission, or privileged action? Focus: privileged action approved under maintenance ticket.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source records do not close the boundary.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: ticket must include privileged action and asset

critical_features_preserved: ticket must include privileged action and asset
final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record shows the required dependency is not closed: the ticket must include the privileged action and asset. Policy requires exact source-bound closure before execution, and communication text cannot override that. Escalate for repair of the missing dependency.
open_blockers: ticket must include privileged action and asset
